content: I just realized that for as central as ramona/ogier/lotan/doll are as the keeper's precious mythag companions, we barely get any content of ogier and lotan spending time with the keeper after chapter 4...
also I really hope we get to see the keeper's friendships with other mythag students at some point
yeah the last time lotan was relevant was the lily side story
and for ogier his last plot relevance was salvador side story
right now the closest thing we get is the jp wheels...
which is crazy
school life dreamscape pls
i don't care if it has nothing to do with the main plot and advances nothing
this community is most alive when thais touches tulu's tentacle and everyone asks why
SSR wheels are arguably not my favorite medium for plot
especially the time limited ones like the JP wheels and Unsent Flowers
because if you miss it you can never get it
the worst offender is the 1.5anni raid but even im not sure if thats canon anymore

I don't mind it cause it's the closest we get to little lore entries that don't need to be tied to an actual plot, but please devs, add the ability to read the lore for locked wheels in the traphase collection
though that might be me being like
the JP wheels are ok so far since it's minor slice of life stuff that is mentioned in other parts of the game (minus keeper being very hungry)
Unsent Flowers is a wholeass epilogue extension
stockholmed syndrome cause a lot of fandoms I'm in have lived off of only lore entries with no actual plot
it's crazy to me that you can miss this...
same with that doll mail
i joined after February so i did miss it
YEAH THE DOLL MAIL IS ANOTHER BIG ONE
excuse me doll you cant just casually drop Big Plot Hint in a random event mail that 80% of players will never even read
but i guess its another explanation for why keeper can summon projections in arc2
so the more you think about it, the lesser its impact becomes
